settings.store_tagline: Serving Van Buren/Fort Smith and surrounding areas for fast and easy local pick up!
settings.store_description: This site was created for our customers to better view our entire collection of items. If you're looking for great deals, look no further!

reviews.author: Kristi
reviews.text: Crystal was excellent in her communication. FBMP is a gamble, but she was a breeze to buy from.

reviews.author: Kathy
reviews.text: My purchase was exactly as described was a porch pickup good directions

reviews.author: Anne
reviews.text: Easy to communicate with. Price point was perfect. Would purchase again from this seller.

reviews.author: Jody
reviews.text: Very nice seller!! Everything was very smooth!! Perfect transaction. 10/10.

reviews.author: Kaelin
reviews.text: Very easy to communicate with and very responsive. Easy to arrange to pickup item. Great experience purchasing product from her.

reviews.author: Miranda
reviews.text: She was fantastic! I messed up pick up a few times and she was so understanding! She was great with communication!

reviews.author: Olivia
reviews.text: 11/10!! She was amazing. So communicative, kind, and made my custom item perfectly and so quickly. I would buy from her again & again and highly recommend to anyone!

reviews.author: Trina
reviews.text: My purchase was great and done in a timely manner. Super sweet lady and always kept me updated. Very pleased
